title: biophytum sessile
intro: Biophytum sessile, also known as 'lowai' or 'manjishtha' in some parts of the world, is a succulent plant belonging to the Oxalidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is known for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as its potential to help manage conditions like fever, arthritis, and digestive disorders. Biophytum sessile can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and powder, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
